sections.paragraph: διδαχή, ῆς, ἡ [διδάσκω] teaching, instruction, of activity, but with content implied Mt 7:28; 16:12; J 7:16f; Ac 2:42; Ro 6:17; 2 Ti 4:2; Rv 2:14.—ἐπι τ. δ. τοῦ ϰυρίου over the Lord’s teaching Ac 13:12 (sim. Mt 22:33; Mk 1:22; Lk 4:32), unless δ. is to be understood as a ‘lesson’ taught to an obstructive magician.
